title: KUA I LANG PANG ZO DING

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa sung nuam un, hong hehpihna phat un,
Hong hencip khempeuh phelkhia hi.
Si tawh hong tanzo lau nawn peuh mah kei un,
Zeisu ah deihna teng cing hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Eilam ah Pasian, Eilam ah Pasian,
Eilam hong om leh, Kua i langpang zo ding
Kua? (Kua?) Kua? (Kua?) Kua?
Kua i langpang zo, Kua pang zo ding?

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Topa sung hat un, a thahatna suang un,
Nisim thuman in citak ni.
Siatna'n hong nawk ciang, thuman a ding hangun
Amah i tha leh bukna hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ama thu muang un, a kamciam peel ngeilo,
Khris sung ah Amen hi khin tane
Lei abei zongin a thu bei thei ngeilo,
Lai Siangtho in gen khin zo ta.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Topa sung kip un, a ang muanhuai sungah,
Tawntung nunna ki patna hi.
Athaneempen zong a khut sung pan in ah,
Kuamah in sut zolo ding hi.
